allow: PowerShell(npm show @microsoft/spfx-heft-plugins@1.23.1 dependencies --json 2>$null | ConvertFrom-Json | ForEach-Object { $_.PSObject.Properties | Select-Object Name, Value })

PowerShell($root = npm root -g; Get-ChildItem "$root\\@microsoft\\generator-sharepoint" -Recurse -Filter "package.json.text" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5 | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName })
PowerShell($root = npm root -g; $genDir = "$root\\@microsoft\\generator-sharepoint"; Get-ChildItem "$genDir\\lib" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 20)
PowerShell($root = npm root -g; $genDir = "$root\\@microsoft\\generator-sharepoint\\lib\\generators"; Get-ChildItem "$genDir" -Recurse | Select-Object -First 30 | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName })

PowerShell($root = npm root -g; $templateDir = "$root\\@microsoft\\generator-sharepoint\\lib\\generators\\solution\\templates\\base"; Get-ChildItem "$templateDir" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $_.Name })

PowerShell($root = npm root -g; $genDir = "$root\\@microsoft\\generator-sharepoint\\lib\\generators"; $solDir = "$genDir\\solution"; Get-ChildItem "$solDir" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 30 | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\($solDir, ''\) })

PowerShell($root = npm root -g; $genDir = "$root\\@microsoft\\generator-sharepoint\\lib\\generators\\webpart\\templates\\react"; Get-Content "$genDir\\{componentClassName}.ts"; Write-Host "---PROPS---"; Get-Content "$genDir\\components\\I{componentName}Props.ts"; Write-Host "---TSX---"; Get-Content "$genDir\\components\\{componentName}.tsx")

PowerShell($root = npm root -g; $genDir = "$root\\@microsoft\\generator-sharepoint\\lib\\generators\\solution\\index.js"; Select-String -Path $genDir -Pattern "rush-stack|typescript|react|fluentui|@fluentui" | Select-Object -First 30 | ForEach-Object { $_.Line.Trim\(\) })

PowerShell($root = npm root -g; $depDir = "$root\\@microsoft\\generator-sharepoint\\lib\\common\\dependency"; Get-Content "$depDir\\react.json"; Write-Host "---WEBPART---"; Get-ChildItem "$depDir\\webpart" | ForEach-Object { $_.Name })
